ingredients: 100 g fresh rice noodles (or rice noodles cooked per package)
2 chive stalks (or garlic chives), cut into pieces
1 tsp chili paste (or chili flakes to taste)
Crushed peanuts and lime wedges, for serving
steps: Cook the seasoning sauce (palm sugar, tamarind, fish sauce, chili) in a pan until slightly thickened; set aside.
Heat oil in a wok. Saute shallots until fragrant.
Add shrimp (and tofu if using) and stir-fry until shrimp is just turning pink.
Push ingredients aside and scramble the egg(s) in the wok.
Add noodles and the prepared sauce; toss over high heat until noodles are coated and tender.
Add pickled radish, dried shrimp (optional), bean sprouts, and chives; toss briefly and serve with peanuts and lime.
tips: Have all ingredients prepped before cooking; keep the wok hot and cook quickly so noodles stay springy and shrimp stays tender.
